mapper.sql: d.emp_plan_id, d.mntr_mthd_cd, d.msr_tming_desc, d.msr_device_desc, d.msr_proc_desc, d.fuel_dnsty_desc, d.use_bgng_dt, d.use_end_dt, d.frst_reg_dt, d.frst_reg_user_id, d.last_chg_dt, d.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp.tn_emp_co2_detail d WHERE d.emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN d.use_bgng_dt AND d.use_end_dt ORDER BY d.mntr_mthd_cd ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_co2_detail (emp_plan_id, mntr_mthd_cd, msr_tming_desc, msr_device_desc, msr_proc_desc, fuel_dnsty_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{mntrMthdCd}, #{msrTmingDesc}, #{msrDeviceDesc}, #{msrProcDesc}, #{fuelDnstyDesc}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})

INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_co2_detail (emp_plan_id, mntr_mthd_cd, msr_tming_desc, msr_device_desc, msr_proc_desc, fuel_dnsty_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstEmpPlanId}, mntr_mthd_cd, msr_tming_desc, msr_device_desc, msr_proc_desc, fuel_dnsty_desc, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM emp.tn_emp_co2_detail WHERE emp_plan_id = #{srcEmpPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
